mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS total FROM cash_flow WHERE flow_date = CURDATE() AND type = 'income'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS total FROM cash_flow WHERE flow_date = CURDATE() AND type = 'expense'
SELECT balance_after FROM cash_flow ORDER BY flow_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.total_amount),0) AS total FROM sales s WHERE s.status = 'completed'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS total FROM receipts WHERE status = 'received'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.total_amount + p.fuel_cost + p.crate_cost + p.bag_cost + p.other_cost),0) AS total FROM purchases p WHERE p.status = 'completed'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS total FROM payments WHERE status = 'paid'

SELECT q.id AS quality_id, q.name AS quality_name, q.unit, COALESCE(pi.total_in, 0) - COALESCE(si.total_out, 0) AS quantity FROM egg_qualities q LEFT JOIN (SELECT quality_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_in FROM purchase_items GROUP BY quality_id) pi ON q.id = pi.quality_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT quality_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_out FROM sale_items GROUP BY quality_id) si ON q.id = si.quality_id ORDER BY q.id
SELECT p.id, p.purchase_date, s.name AS supplier_name, p.total_amount FROM purchases p LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.id ORDER BY p.purchase_date DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT s.id, s.sale_date, c.name AS customer_name, s.total_amount FROM sales s LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id = c.id ORDER BY s.sale_date DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT 5
